headline: Inside ‘Project Eagle,’ JPMorgan’s High-Wire Act to Fund EA Deal
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The post from @realDonaldTrump landed at precisely 7:23 a.m. Inside JPMorgan Chase & Co., the final piece of Project Eagle was a go.For weeks, JPMorgan bankers had anxiously watched events in the Middle East as they worked to sell the financing for the biggest leveraged buyout ever, the $55-billion private equity takeover of video-game giant Electronic Arts Inc. headline: Wells Fargo resets gold price target for the rest of 2026
summary: Gold is trading around $4,411 per ounce after falling roughly 17% since the start of March. Wells Fargo Investment Institute says that is exactly the kind of pullback investors should be buying. The bank raised its 2026 year-end gold price target to $6,100 to $6,300 per ounce, up sharply from its ...

headline: How The EOG Resources (EOG) Narrative Is Shifting With New Oil And Cash Flow Assumptions
summary: EOG Resources has seen its fair value price target adjusted from US$134.86 to US$142.10, a change of about 5% that puts a spotlight on how analysts are recalibrating their views. Much of the current debate turns on how much weight to place on EOG's oil exposure, free cash flow potential, and drilling inventory as geopolitical risk feeds into commodity assumptions and valuation targets. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the broader analyst narrative and what...

headline: Wells Fargo Digital Milestone Puts AI And Mobile At Center Stage
summary: Wells Fargo (NYSE:WFC) reports over 1 billion customer interactions with its AI-powered virtual assistant, Fargo, in under three years. The bank's mobile active user base now stands at more than 33 million. The company highlights this as a major milestone in its ongoing digital transformation efforts. For a large US bank like Wells Fargo, digital usage is becoming as important as branch and call center activity. The Fargo virtual assistant and a mobile user base of more than 33 million...
